# Tridiagonal Matrix

**Summary**: A matrix where non-zero elements are only on the main diagonal and the two adjacent diagonals.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] used tridiagonal matrices in LSOR and ADIP methods.

## Scientific Context

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] allows for efficient linear solving in 1D problems.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] mathematical derivation

## Key Findings Across Sources

- Thomas algorithm was used to solve these matrices efficiently. ([[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993, p. 117]])
- [[1993-al-towailib|Al-Towailib, 1993]] not stated
